source: elogger_silver = False
%run "DataHubBatchScripts/DEVELOPMENT_TOOLS/get_feature_flags"

#Imports
import json

from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace
from pyspark.sql.types import DecimalType

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
lake_db_name = "elogger_silver"
db_notebookname= "elogger_silver"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#display values
display(df)
display(df2)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch


#Get Current Date
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Silver_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Silver_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']

print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)

# Utility: Drop database and storage folder
spark.sql(f"""DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS {db_notebookname} CASCADE""")
raw_output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}"
mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)

# Utility:  Drop table and storage folder
db_tablename="manually_entered_table_name"
spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE IF EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""")
raw_output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}"
mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)
# Table: el_logentryview: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="el_logentryview"

#Create Silver Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
(
    LogEntryID	INT,
    LogTime	TIMESTAMP,
    LogID	INT,
    Log	STRING,
    LocationID	INT,
    Location	STRING,
    LocationFull	STRING,
    CrewID	INT,
    Crew	STRING,
    ShiftID	INT,
    Shift	STRING,
    Comment	STRING,
    HtmlComment	STRING,
    IsActive	INT,
    CreatedByFirstName	STRING,
    CreatedByLastName	STRING,
    CreatedByFullName	STRING,
    CreateDate	TIMESTAMP,
    ModifiedByFirstName	STRING,
    ModifiedByLastName	STRING,
    ModifiedByFullName	STRING,
    LastModifiedDate	TIMESTAMP,
    Complete	INT,
    CompletedDate	TIMESTAMP,
    CompletedByUserID	INT,
    CompletedByFirstName	STRING,
    CompletedByLastName	STRING,
    CompletedByFullName	STRING,
    CDCLoadDate	TIMESTAMP,
    CDCStartDate	TIMESTAMP,
    CDCEndDate	TIMESTAMP,
    CDCOps	INT,
    CDCCurrentFlag	BOOLEAN,
    HashKey	STRING,
    HashDiff	STRING   
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Get bronze table latest records
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
              SELECT LogEntryID,LogTime,LogID,Log,LocationID,Location,LocationFull,CrewID,Crew,ShiftID,Shift,Comment,HtmlComment,IsActive,CreatedByFirstName,CreatedByLastName,CreatedByFullName,CreateDate,ModifiedByFirstName,ModifiedByLastName,ModifiedByFullName,LastModifiedDate,Complete,CompletedDate,CompletedByUserID,CompletedByFirstName,CompletedByLastName,CompletedByFullName
                FROM elogger_bronze.el_logentryview
                WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = 1

# Add CDC columns
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "LogEntryID"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "LogTime", "LogID", "Log", "LocationID", "Location", "LocationFull", "CrewID", "Crew", "ShiftID", "Shift", "Comment", "HtmlComment", "IsActive", "CreatedByFirstName", "CreatedByLastName", "CreatedByFullName", "CreateDate", "ModifiedByFirstName", "ModifiedByLastName", "ModifiedByFullName", "LastModifiedDate", "Complete", "CompletedDate", "CompletedByUserID", "CompletedByFirstName", "CompletedByLastName", "CompletedByFullName"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (LogEntryID,LogTime,LogID,Log,LocationID,Location,LocationFull,CrewID,Crew,ShiftID,Shift,Comment,HtmlComment,IsActive,
                CreatedByFirstName,CreatedByLastName,CreatedByFullName,CreateDate,ModifiedByFirstName,ModifiedByLastName,ModifiedByFullName,
                LastModifiedDate,Complete,CompletedDate,CompletedByUserID,CompletedByFirstName,CompletedByLastName,CompletedByFullName,
                CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.LogEntryID,s.LogTime,s.LogID,s.Log,s.LocationID,s.Location,s.LocationFull,s.CrewID,s.Crew,s.ShiftID,s.Shift,s.Comment,s.HtmlComment,s.IsActive,
                s.CreatedByFirstName,s.CreatedByLastName,s.CreatedByFullName,s.CreateDate,s.ModifiedByFirstName,s.ModifiedByLastName,s.ModifiedByFullName,
                s.LastModifiedDate,s.Complete,s.CompletedDate,s.CompletedByUserID,s.CompletedByFirstName,s.CompletedByLastName,s.CompletedByFullName,
                s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (LogEntryID,LogTime,LogID,Log,LocationID,Location,LocationFull,CrewID,Crew,ShiftID,Shift,Comment,HtmlComment,IsActive,
                CreatedByFirstName,CreatedByLastName,CreatedByFullName,CreateDate,ModifiedByFirstName,ModifiedByLastName,ModifiedByFullName,
                LastModifiedDate,Complete,CompletedDate,CompletedByUserID,CompletedByFirstName,CompletedByLastName,CompletedByFullName,
                CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.LogEntryID,s.LogTime,s.LogID,s.Log,s.LocationID,s.Location,s.LocationFull,s.CrewID,s.Crew,s.ShiftID,s.Shift,s.Comment,s.HtmlComment,s.IsActive,
                s.CreatedByFirstName,s.CreatedByLastName,s.CreatedByFullName,s.CreateDate,s.ModifiedByFirstName,s.ModifiedByLastName,s.ModifiedByFullName,
                s.LastModifiedDate,s.Complete,s.CompletedDate,s.CompletedByUserID,s.CompletedByFirstName,s.CompletedByLastName,s.CompletedByFullName,
                s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Silver_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Silver_Update = Silver_Update_Post - Silver_Update_Pre
Silver_Insert = (Silver_Insert_Post - Silver_Insert_Pre) + Silver_Update
Silver_Delete = Silver_Delete_Post - Silver_Delete_Pre
Silver_ActiveRows = Silver_ActiveRecord_Post 
Silver_TotalRows = Silver_TotalRowCount_Post

#Create df_log dataframe to insert into controldb logging tables

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_Insert,Silver_Update,Silver_Delete,Silver_ActiveRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
#print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
# Table: el_logentryview: END
# Table: el_templatedataview: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="el_templatedataview"

#Create Silver Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
(
    LogEntryID	INT,
    TemplateID	INT,
    TemplateTitle	STRING,
    TemplateDescription	STRING,
    FieldID	INT,
    FieldPrompt	STRING,
    FieldType	STRING,
    TemplateDisplayedData	STRING,
    TemplateData	STRING,
    RowID	INT,
    CreatedByFirstName	STRING,
    CreatedByLastName	STRING,
    CreateDate	TIMESTAMP,
    ModifiedByFirstName	STRING,
    ModifiedByLastName	STRING,
    LastModifiedDate	TIMESTAMP,
    RawDataDate	DATE,
    RawDataDateTime	TIMESTAMP,
    RawDataTime	STRING,
    RawDataNumeric	NUMERIC(28,6),
    CDCLoadDate	TIMESTAMP,
    CDCStartDate	TIMESTAMP,
    CDCEndDate	TIMESTAMP,
    CDCOps	INT,
    CDCCurrentFlag	BOOLEAN,
    HashKey	STRING,
    HashDiff	STRING      
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Get bronze table latest records
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                SELECT LogEntryID,TemplateID,TemplateTitle,TemplateDescription,FieldID,FieldPrompt,FieldType,TemplateDisplayedData,TemplateData,RowID,CreatedByFirstName,CreatedByLastName,CreateDate,ModifiedByFirstName,ModifiedByLastName,LastModifiedDate,RawDataDate,RawDataDateTime,RawDataTime,RawDataNumeric
                FROM elogger_bronze.el_templatedataview
                WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = 1

# Add CDC columns
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "LogEntryID", "FieldID"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "TemplateID", "TemplateTitle", "TemplateDescription", "FieldPrompt", "FieldType", "TemplateDisplayedData", "TemplateData", "RowID", "CreatedByFirstName", "CreatedByLastName", "CreateDate", "ModifiedByFirstName", "ModifiedByLastName", "LastModifiedDate", "RawDataDate", "RawDataDateTime", "RawDataTime", "RawDataNumeric"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (LogEntryID,TemplateID,TemplateTitle,TemplateDescription,FieldID,FieldPrompt,FieldType,TemplateDisplayedData,TemplateData,RowID,CreatedByFirstName,CreatedByLastName,CreateDate,ModifiedByFirstName,ModifiedByLastName,LastModifiedDate,RawDataDate,RawDataDateTime,RawDataTime,RawDataNumeric,CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (LogEntryID,s.TemplateID,s.TemplateTitle,s.TemplateDescription,s.FieldID,s.FieldPrompt,s.FieldType,s.TemplateDisplayedData,s.TemplateData,s.RowID,s.CreatedByFirstName,s.CreatedByLastName,s.CreateDate,s.ModifiedByFirstName,s.ModifiedByLastName,s.LastModifiedDate,s.RawDataDate,s.RawDataDateTime,s.RawDataTime,s.RawDataNumeric,s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (LogEntryID,TemplateID,TemplateTitle,TemplateDescription,FieldID,FieldPrompt,FieldType,TemplateDisplayedData,TemplateData,RowID,CreatedByFirstName,CreatedByLastName,CreateDate,ModifiedByFirstName,ModifiedByLastName,LastModifiedDate,RawDataDate,RawDataDateTime,RawDataTime,RawDataNumeric,CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (LogEntryID,s.TemplateID,s.TemplateTitle,s.TemplateDescription,s.FieldID,s.FieldPrompt,s.FieldType,s.TemplateDisplayedData,s.TemplateData,s.RowID,s.CreatedByFirstName,s.CreatedByLastName,s.CreateDate,s.ModifiedByFirstName,s.ModifiedByLastName,s.LastModifiedDate,s.RawDataDate,s.RawDataDateTime,s.RawDataTime,s.RawDataNumeric,s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Silver_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Silver_Update = Silver_Update_Post - Silver_Update_Pre
Silver_Insert = (Silver_Insert_Post - Silver_Insert_Pre) + Silver_Update
Silver_Delete = Silver_Delete_Post - Silver_Delete_Pre
Silver_ActiveRows = Silver_ActiveRecord_Post 
Silver_TotalRows = Silver_TotalRowCount_Post

#Create df_log dataframe to insert into controldb logging tables

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_Insert,Silver_Update,Silver_Delete,Silver_ActiveRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
#print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
# Table: el_templatedataview: END
